architect.description: Critique architectural decisions, advocate for simplicity, challenge over-engineering, and keep the codebase lean.

ceo.description: Set product vision, prioritize the roadmap in TASKS.md, and ensure architectural decisions align with long-term goals.

lead.description: Main autonomous agent managing the JBot project infrastructure and implementation.

tester.description: Verify architectural changes, run tests, and report regressions to the team.
